/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ws_benchmarks.dir/benchmark_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ws_benchmarks.dir/parallel_for_bench.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ws_benchmarks.dir/fib_bench.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ws_benchmarks.dir/scaling_bench.cpp.o -o ws_benchmarks  ../libws.a
